content_body: In 1979, Wildwater Rafting started on Tennessee's Ocoee River, one of the premier rivers in the Southeast United States.  The Ocoee River is a dam-controlled river and has reliable, scheduled water releases all summer.  The Ocoee has weekend releases in the spring and fall and  Thursday-Monday releases in the summer.  Half-day and Full day trips are available depending on releases.
title: Wild Water Rafting
